curation_notes: Patch commit e8ffe9d modifies 2 non-test source files: IOParser.java (adds isPayloadValid() validation after decoding) and Manager.java (inlines ondata() methods with try-catch for DecodingException). The primary vulnerability is in IOParser.Decoder.decodeString() which parses packets without validating that the payload type matches expectations for the packet type, leading to NPE. The Manager.ondata() methods also lacked proper error containment. Locations derived from the patch diff.
